headline: Halliburton Buys Sekal As Investors Weigh Automation And Valuation Upside
summary: Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) has acquired Sekal AS, a digital drilling autonomy company, to expand its drilling automation capabilities. The deal brings together Halliburton’s LOGIX autonomous drilling platform with Sekal’s DrillTronics software for more integrated automated drilling solutions. The acquisition signals a stronger push into digital drilling and automation within Halliburton’s oilfield services portfolio. For investors watching NYSE:HAL, this move comes with the stock trading around...
